# Astro Sveltia Cloudflare

> Multilingual marketing website boilerplate built with Astro, Sveltia CMS, and Cloudflare Pages. Ships with light/dark theming, i18n (English and Indonesian), blog, documentation, and SEO defaults.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://web-astro-sveltia-cloudflare-starter.pages.dev/): Production-ready marketing homepage.
- [About](https://web-astro-sveltia-cloudflare-starter.pages.dev/about): Project background and overview.
- [Services](https://web-astro-sveltia-cloudflare-starter.pages.dev/services): Service offerings.
- [Pricing](https://web-astro-sveltia-cloudflare-starter.pages.dev/pricing): Plans and pricing tiers.
- [Contact](https://web-astro-sveltia-cloudflare-starter.pages.dev/contact): Contact form and details.
- [Blog](https://web-astro-sveltia-cloudflare-starter.pages.dev/blog): Articles and updates.
- [Documentation](https://web-astro-sveltia-cloudflare-starter.pages.dev/docs): Setup and usage guides.

## Stack

- [Astro](https://astro.build): Static site generator for fast content sites.
- [Sveltia CMS](https://github.com/sveltia/sveltia-cms): Git-based content editing in the browser.
- [Cloudflare Pages](https://pages.cloudflare.com): Edge deployment with D1 and R2 storage.
